credit: Twin Buttes Lookout, Willamette National Forest, Lane County, 9-12-33. Photograph: Moe-Sorlin. Courtesy Oregon Websites & Watersheds Project (ORWW).
alt_text: Black-and-white panoramic view of forested ridges in the Willamette National Forest, photographed from the Twin Buttes Lookout in 1933.
note: ORWW publishes this image only as a banner composite with their organization name, logo, and 'Online Tools...' overlay text rendered into the JPG. No clean version is available in the public ORWW archive. Hero swapped to osborne-panoramic.jpg in v66.1.

credit: Roger Ott fishing on Gould's Lake, ca. 1951. Photograph: Don Stonehill, courtesy of the Gould family. Courtesy Oregon Websites & Watersheds Project (ORWW).
alt_text: Black-and-white photograph of Roger Ott standing in waders on the shore of Gould's Lake in 1951, holding a fly rod and a stringer of small trout.

credit: 2018 SWOCC F 251 Forest Recreation class field trip, Elliott State Forest. Photograph: Matthews, 2018-05-15. Courtesy Oregon Websites & Watersheds Project (ORWW).
alt_text: Color photograph of a 2018 Southwestern Oregon Community College forest recreation class gathered on a gravel forest road in the Elliott State Forest.

credit: Black-Priest trail, Elliott State Forest, 2019-05-21. Used by ORWW to illustrate the 2020 SWOCC Virtual Roads and Trails Report. Courtesy Oregon Websites & Watersheds Project (ORWW).
alt_text: Color photograph of two people walking along a narrow fern-lined forest trail through tall conifers in the Elliott State Forest.

credit: Henry P. Hansen, Oregon Agricultural College / Oregon State University, ca. 1960s. Courtesy Oregon Websites & Watersheds Project (ORWW), via the Henry P. Hansen Publications 1938-1967 project.
alt_text: Black-and-white seated portrait of botanist and palynologist Henry P. Hansen at a desk surrounded by books, wearing a suit and tie.

credit: Bald Mountain Lookout, Polk County, Oregon, west panorama (180-300 degrees), 1936-06-30. Western Oregon Osborne Photos, 1932-1940. Courtesy Oregon Websites & Watersheds Project (ORWW).
alt_text: Black-and-white 1936 Osborne fire-lookout panoramic photograph taken from Bald Mountain in Polk County, Oregon, showing layered ridgelines of the Coast Range stretching west toward the horizon.
selection_note: Chose the Polk County Bald Mountain west-facing (180-300) panorama because (a) the brief preferred Lane or Polk County, (b) the Osbornes_Project/Lane index page returned HTTP 404 at fetch time, leaving Polk's Bald Mountain as the strongest Polk/Lane candidate, and (c) the layered Coast Range ridges make a dramatic landscape composition.
